title: Splitsvilla
subTitle: Young men and women go through various obstacles, challenges, and intense heartbreaks to find their perfect partner.

title: Night Out
subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies Real Heroes
subTitle: Ranvijay briefs the contestants about their task to free the gang leaders locked in cages. However, Nikhil feels heartbroken when nobody chooses to rescue him.

title: Roadies
subTitle: The contestants' poignant and inspiring life stories deeply move Rannvijay and the gang leaders, evoking heartfelt emotions.
